metadata.description: Name of the azd environment (used as prefix for resources).
Azure region for all resources.
Region for the Foundry account+project. Leave empty to reuse location. Use a Voice Live supported region (eastus2, swedencentral, southeastasia, centralindia, westus2) if location is not one.
Name of the resource group to create / deploy into.
Object ID of the deploying principal (for direct role assignments, optional).
Name of an existing Application Insights component to reuse. Leave empty to create a new one in this RG.
Resource group of the existing Application Insights component. Defaults to the deployment RG when empty.
Foundry connection name for the Grounding-with-Bing-Custom-Search resource. Surfaces as BING_CONNECTION_NAME in the container.
Bing Custom Search configuration (instance) name — the curated domain allow-list. Surfaces as BING_CUSTOM_CONFIG_NAME in the container.
Assistant persona / display name (e.g. "Nuru") for the bot welcome message. Purely cosmetic; does NOT select the avatar model. Empty falls back to "Avatar".
Identity tagline under the avatar name (e.g. "Your MTN Digital Assistant"). Empty uses the company-agnostic default.
Bot Entra app client id (Microsoft App ID). Leave empty to skip bot provisioning. Surfaces as TEAMS_BOT_ID.
Bot app tenant id (single-tenant). Defaults to the deployment tenant when empty.
Bot app client secret. Stored as a Container App secret. Required when botAppId is set.
Display name for the Azure Bot resource.
Teams app (manifest) id used for bot deep links to the personal tab. Surfaces as TEAMS_APP_ID.
Foundry agent id override. Empty resolves the agent by AGENT_NAME.
Enable Phase 2b ACS Call Automation media participant ("true"/"false"). When not "true" (default), no ACS resource is created and the deployment behaves exactly as today.
ACS data residency geography (NOT an Azure region), e.g. "United States", "Europe", "Africa".
Region for the Foundry account+project (defaults to location).
Name of an existing Application Insights component to reuse. Leave empty to create a new one.
Resource group of the existing Application Insights component. Defaults to the deployment RG when empty.
Enable Phase 2b ACS Call Automation media participant ("true"/"false"). When not "true" (default), no ACS resource is created and the container behaves as today.
ACS data residency geography (NOT an Azure region), e.g. "United States", "Europe", "Africa".
Principal ID of the UAMI to grant AcrPull.
Cognitive Services account (kind=AIServices) name.
Foundry project name (child of the account).
Object ID of the deployer (optional). Granted Azure AI Developer for setup scripts.
Embedding model deployment (used by setup_aisearch_index.py to vectorize data/*.docx).
Search service name to link as a Foundry project connection (optional). Leave empty to skip.
Search service endpoint (https://<name>.search.windows.net/). Required when searchServiceName is set.
Search service resource ID. Required when searchServiceName is set.
Name of the project connection created for the search service.
Deployer object ID (optional). Granted Search Service Contributor + Index Data Contributor so setup_aisearch_index.py can create the index and upload docs locally.
AI Search service name (in this resource group).
Foundry project SMI principalId. Granted Search Index Data Contributor + Search Service Contributor so the agents azure_ai_search tool can read the index at runtime.
Foundry/Cognitive Services account name (in this resource group).
AI Search service SMI principalId. Granted Cognitive Services OpenAI User so the search vectorizer (authIdentity=null) can call Azure OpenAI to embed queries.
Name of the Azure Communication Services resource.
Resource tags.
Data residency / geography for the ACS resource (NOT an Azure region). e.g. "United States", "Europe", "Africa".
Search service endpoint (https://<name>.search.windows.net/)
Assistant persona / display name (e.g. "Nuru") for the bot welcome message. Purely cosmetic; does NOT select the avatar model. Empty falls back to "Avatar".
Identity tagline under the avatar name (e.g. "Your MTN Digital Assistant"). Empty uses the company-agnostic default.
"true"/"false" string — frontend treats prebuilt as photo avatar when "true".
"true"/"false" string — frontend treats avatar as custom when "true".
Speech recognition model. Defaults to mai-transcribe-1; cascaded options include azure-speech, gpt-4o-transcribe.
Recognition language locale (BCP-47, e.g. en-ZA). Use "auto" to let the SR model auto-detect.
Bot Entra app client id. Surfaces as the SERVICE_CONNECTION client id + TEAMS_BOT_ID. Empty disables bot env wiring.
Bot app tenant id (single-tenant). Defaults handled by caller.
Bot app client secret. Stored as a Container App secret and referenced by the SERVICE_CONNECTION client secret env var.
Teams app (manifest) id used to build deep links from the bot to the personal tab.
Foundry agent id override. Empty means resolve the agent by AGENT_NAME.
ACS endpoint for the Call Automation media participant. Empty disables Phase 2b in the container.
Placeholder image used on first provision; azd replaces it during `azd deploy`.

variables.botEnv: [if(variables('botEnabled'), concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'TEAMS_BOT_ID', 'value', parameters('botAppId')), createObject('name', 'TEAMS_APP_ID', 'value', parameters('teamsAppId')), createObject('name', 'AGENT_ID', 'value', parameters('agentId')), createObject('name', 'CONNECTIONS__SERVICE_CONNECTION__SETTINGS__CLIENTID', 'value', parameters('botAppId')), createObject('name', 'CONNECTIONS__SERVICE_CONNECTION__SETTINGS__TENANTID', 'value', parameters('botAppTenantId'))), if(not(empty(parameters('botAppPassword'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'CONNECTIONS__SERVICE_CONNECTION__SETTINGS__CLIENTSECRET', 'secretRef', 'bot-app-password')), createArray())), createArray())]

containers.name: web
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'PORT', 'value', '3000'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('uamiClientId')), createObject('name', 'DEVELOPER_MODE', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_VOICELIVE_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('voiceliveEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'PROJECT_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('projectEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AGENT_NAME', 'value', parameters('agentName')), createObject('name', 'AGENT_PROJECT_NAME', 'value', parameters('agentProjectName')), createObject('name', 'AGENT_MODEL', 'value', parameters('agentModel')), createObject('name', 'EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('embeddingDeployment')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('searchEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'SEARCH_CONNECTION_NAME', 'value', parameters('searchConnectionName')), createObject('name', 'SEARCH_INDEX_NAME', 'value', parameters('searchIndexName')), createObject('name', 'VOICELIVE_VOICE', 'value', parameters('voiceLiveVoice')), createObject('name', 'BING_CONNECTION_NAME', 'value', parameters('bingConnectionName')), createObject('name', 'BING_CUSTOM_CONFIG_NAME', 'value', parameters('bingCustomConfigName')), createObject('name', 'AVATAR_NAME', 'value', parameters('avatarName')), createObject('name', 'CUSTOM_AVATAR_NAME', 'value', parameters('customAvatarName')), createObject('name', 'AVATAR_DISPLAY_NAME', 'value', parameters('avatarDisplayName')), createObject('name', 'AVATAR_TAGLINE', 'value', parameters('avatarTagline')), createObject('name', 'PHOTO_AVATAR_NAME', 'value', parameters('photoAvatarName')), createObject('name', 'IS_PHOTO_AVATAR', 'value', parameters('isPhotoAvatar')), createObject('name', 'IS_CUSTOM_AVATAR', 'value', parameters('isCustomAvatar')), createObject('name', 'AVATAR_BACKGROUND_IMAGE_URL', 'value', parameters('avatarBackgroundImageUrl')), createObject('name', 'SR_MODEL', 'value', parameters('srModel')), createObject('name', 'RECOGNITION_LANGUAGE', 'value', parameters('recognitionLanguage')), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString'))), concat(variables('botEnv'), variables('acsEnv')))]

metadata.description: Name of the Azure Bot resource.
Display name shown for the bot.
Resource tags.
Microsoft App ID (Entra app client id) backing the bot.
Tenant ID for the single-tenant bot app registration.
Messaging endpoint — the ACA HTTPS URL + /api/messages.
